user_story: As a System admin, I want to enable or disable the learning management module, so that the organization only uses training features when required
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I select Yes or No for enabling the learning management module and click Save; Then the module is enabled or disabled accordingly

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save and move to the next step in one action, so that I can configure learning management efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen whether to enable the module; When I click Save & Next; Then my choice is saved and I proceed to the next configuration step

user_story: As a System admin, I want to cancel the setup, so that I can leave without applying changes
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I click Cancel; Then my unsaved selection is discarded and I exit the screen
